name: Low Quality Text Dataset
description: Text samples with simulated noise, blur, and poor contrast that challenge OCR engines.

pages.ground_truth: This page simulates a low-resolution fax transmission. Some characters may be merged or broken.
Water damaged document. Ink has smeared and some letters are barely legible. The text should still be recoverable.
Photocopy of a photocopy. Contrast is extremely low and the page has speckle noise throughout.
